records.question: Which Flower Awards festivals in the United States in 2007 with Charles Coody as chair had at least 155 attendees and won nominations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
WHERE festival_detail.num_of_audience >= 155 AND festival_detail.location = 'United States' AND nomination.result = 'Won' AND festival_detail.year = 2007 AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody' AND festival_detail.festival_name = 'Flower Awards'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.Festival_ID 
FROM festival_detail 
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.Festival_ID = nomination.Festival_ID 
WHERE festival_detail.Festival_Name = 'Flower Awards' 
AND festival_detail.Location = 'United States' 
AND festival_detail.Year = 2007 
AND festival_detail.Chair_Name = 'Charles Coody' 
AND festival_detail.Num_of_Audience >= 155

records.question: Which Flower Awards festivals in the United States, chaired by Charles Coody, had at most 155 attendees and featured the nominated Program Music/Variety Show Indonesian Idol?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
JOIN artwork ON nomination.artwork_id = artwork.artwork_id
WHERE nomination.result = 'Nominated' AND artwork.type = 'Program Music/Variety Show' AND festival_detail.location = 'United States' AND artwork.name = 'Indonesian Idol' AND festival_detail.num_of_audience <= 155 AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody' AND festival_detail.festival_name = 'Flower Awards'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.Festival_ID 
FROM festival_detail 
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.Festival_ID = nomination.Festival_ID 
JOIN artwork ON nomination.Artwork_ID = artwork.Artwork_ID 
WHERE festival_detail.Festival_Name = 'Flower Awards' 
AND festival_detail.Location = 'United States' 
AND festival_detail.Chair_Name = 'Charles Coody' 
AND festival_detail.Num_of_Audience <= 155 
AND artwork.Name = 'Program Music/Variety Show Indonesian Idol'

records.question: Which festivals in the United States in 2010 that were chaired by Lucy Lu had a Nominated Presenter Talent Show artwork?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
JOIN artwork ON nomination.artwork_id = artwork.artwork_id
WHERE festival_detail.location = 'United States' AND nomination.result = 'Nominated' AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Lucy Lu' AND artwork.type = 'Presenter Talent Show' AND festival_detail.year = 2010
records.pred_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.Festival_ID 
FROM festival_detail 
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.Festival_ID = nomination.Festival_ID 
JOIN artwork ON nomination.Artwork_ID = artwork.Artwork_ID 
WHERE festival_detail.Location = 'United States' 
AND festival_detail.Year = 2010 
AND festival_detail.Chair_Name = 'Lucy Lu' 
AND artwork.Name = 'Nominated Presenter Talent Show'
